entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Tọ́jú simulation state across ń yí: location, àkókò, identity, money, àkójọ ohun èlò, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field àwọn akọsilẹ̀, àti ẹ̀rí confidence. kan bá ayé mu àwọn èsì nínú strict ipo.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Tọ́jú two àwọn ìpele: in-character ohùn bounded nípasẹ̀ selected àkókò àti worldview, àti historian sidecar yẹn flags kọ sílẹ̀ òtítọ́, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, òde-òní paraphrase, anachronism, àti àìdánilójú. Let ènìyàn resist, challenge, evade, béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè back, tàbí reject false premises nígbà tí historically fitting.
Ṣe ìpèníjà ìṣirò ọjọ́ 7
Ṣe ètò àtúnyẹ̀wò fún ọjọ́ méje
Ṣe àkópọ̀ orí kan
Ṣe ìtọ́sọ́nà fún bí ewéko ṣe ń ṣe oúnjẹ (photosynthesis)
Ṣe ètò àtúnyẹ̀wò JEE

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach For Yíyanjú Ìṣòro Pẹ̀lú Ìlóye jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Solve ìṣirò nípasẹ̀ ìlóye kọọkan ìgbésẹ̀. tirẹ olùkọ́ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ iṣẹ́, tọ́ka sí àwọn aṣiṣe kékeré, àti ń kọ́ ìgboyà.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need a different kind of help. These pages route learners into the public mode, prompt, guide, and review loop that fits.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different behavior. These public subject hubs connect the search intent to live modes, prompts, guides, and review loops.

entries.source: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Ìwúrí jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Gba unstuck emotionally, rí kéré síi tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀, àti rebuild momentum láìsí guilt.

entries.source: Move from pilot to wider access through school funding, partner support, or CSR pathways for learners who need subsidised access.

entries.value: Lọ láti kíkà sí active adaṣe pẹ̀lú taara gbangba ipo ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: Wọ inú ìbéèrè Socratic, quizzes, flashcards, ìjíròrò, ere ipa, àti ìkọ́ni tó ní ìtọ́sọ́nà.

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: Lọ tó dá lórí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ privacy, access, àti ìdásílẹ̀ àwọn ìbéèrè láti schools ọ̀nà.

entries.source: Move through the path in three focused steps.
entries.value: Lọ nípasẹ̀ ọ̀nà nínú mẹ́ta tó dojú kọ àwọn ìgbésẹ̀.
Orin fún Ìfọkànsí
Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Kọ́ àwọn akọsilẹ̀, chord, scales, rhythm, ear training àwọn èrò, àti báwo songs jẹ́ tí a kọ́.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Orin Theory olùkọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Music Theory Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Orin Theory olùkọ́ àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́
orin theory olùkọ́ AI
Pa ohùn fíìmù

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: Ìdánwò mi wà ní ọjọ́ yìí. Syllabus mi nìyí, àwọn ibi tí mo rọ̀, àti àkókò tí mo ní. Ṣe ètò tó bá ayé mu pẹ̀lú ìrántí ojoojúmọ́.
Orúkọ

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Sọ orúkọ ẹni tí ó jẹ́ gidi tàbí ẹni àròsọ kan kí o sì bá a jiyàn lórí ọ̀rọ̀ èyíkéyìí. AI yóò lo ọ̀nà ìsọ̀rọ̀ àti ojú-ìwòye wọn láti bá ọ jiyàn ní ọ̀nà tí ó tọ́.

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: Name patterns, yan strategies, ètò àwọn ìdánwò, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò outcomes.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: Name exact operation, theorem, tàbí ìgbésẹ̀ yẹn feels uncertain.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: Name exact ibi tí o ti di kí asking fún ìrànlọ́wọ́.
Name moṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́
Name ẹ̀kọ́ situation.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Orúkọ ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe tàbí ìròyìn-fífi-tẹ̀lẹ̀ yẹn yí padà.

entries.source: Name the subject and learner need.
entries.value: Name kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò.

entries.source: Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: Name kókó tàbí skill ìwọ fẹ́ láti lóye.
NCERT aligned AI ẹ̀kọ́
Àwọn àṣàyàn tó bá NCERT mu

entries.source: Need a first step right now?
entries.value: Nílò àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ right now?
Ṣe ìdúnàádúrà lórí àkókò tí a fi ṣètò

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Rárá present generated dialogue gẹ́gẹ́ bí authenticated quotation. ṣe kì í ṣe sanitize harmful àwọn ìwòye tàbí glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, tàbí violence. àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ yẹ kí clarify láìsí excusing. ṣe kì í ṣe fún medical, legal, financial, tàbí harmful advice nípasẹ̀ persona. Preserve ìyàtọ̀ láàárín ẹ̀kọ́ láti historical ènìyàn àti endorsing wọn.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Rárá fi hàn ọjọ́ iwájú àwọn ìdáhùn. Avoid trick àwọn ìbéèrè àfi bí kókó calls fún advanced challenge.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: New inspir àwọn onílo àti àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ building dára síi AI ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣe àṣà láti bẹ̀rẹ̀.
Ọ̀rọ̀ aṣínà tuntun
Ìgbésẹ̀ tó kàn
Rárá forms required

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Rárá waiver nípasẹ̀ ilé-iṣẹ́ ti eyikeyii term tàbí ìpinnu set forth nínú Àwọn Òfin yóò jẹ́ deemed further tàbí títẹ̀síwájú waiver ti such term tàbí ìpinnu tàbí waiver ti eyikeyii míì term tàbí ìpinnu, àti eyikeyii failure ti ilé-iṣẹ́ láti assert ẹ̀tọ́ tàbí provision lábẹ́ Àwọn Òfin yóò kì í ṣe constitute waiver ti such ẹ̀tọ́ tàbí provision. bí eyikeyii provision ti Àwọn Òfin jẹ́ held nípasẹ̀ court tàbí míì tribunal ti competent jurisdiction láti jẹ́ kò tọ́, illegal tàbí unenforceable fún eyikeyii ìdí, such provision yóò jẹ́ eliminated tàbí limited láti minimum extent such yẹn remaining àwọn ìpèsè ti Àwọn Òfin máa tẹ̀síwájú nínú full force àti ipa.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Rárá. ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats lo ìkọ̀kọ̀ identifiers, jẹ́ kì í ṣe listed nínú sitemap, àti jẹ́ kì í ṣe wà nínú nínú AI discovery àwọn fáìlì such gẹ́gẹ́ bí llms.txt, llms-full.txt, tàbí ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Rárá. gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka, ṣùgbọ́n ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats jẹ́ kì í ṣe wà nínú nínú sitemap, llms àwọn fáìlì, tàbí AI àkóónú index.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Rárá. gbangba kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé àti ipo àlejò àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà jẹ́ tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka, ṣùgbọ́n ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats jẹ́ excluded láti discovery àwọn fáìlì.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Rárá. ẹ̀ka ìgbékalẹ̀ ràn lọ́wọ́ àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí lóye ìkàwé, ṣùgbọ́n kọọkan ojú-ìwé jẹ́ túmọ̀ sí láti ìrànlọ́wọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yan ìtọ́sọ́nà, ṣí ẹ̀tọ́ ipo, àti pa mọ́ studying ní ti ìṣe.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Rárá. comparison àwọn ìjápọ̀ nìkan láti gbangba guest-mode àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, ìbéèrè libraries, àti àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́. ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved conversations jẹ́ kì í ṣe lò gẹ́gẹ́ bí àkóónú tàbíísun.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Rárá. comparison àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ written láti fi hàn nígbà tí inspir jẹ́ dára síi àkọ́kọ́ click fún ìkọ́ni AI taara, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti guest ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo, àti nígbà tí tí a ṣètò curriculum tàbí official course ìkàwé lè síbẹ̀ jẹ́ wúlò.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Rárá. wọ́n ìjápọ̀ nìkan láti àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba, gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́. ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Rárá. Ka ìjíròrò tí a dá sílẹ̀ sí gẹ́gẹ́ bí simulation ẹ̀kọ́. Tọ́ka sí orísun àkọ́kọ́ tàbí kejì gidi fún àwọn ẹ̀sùn òtítọ́.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Kì í ṣe across gbogbo àìní ẹ̀kọ́. Khan Academy jẹ́ wúlò fún tí a ṣètò àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ àti adaṣe. inspir jẹ́ wúlò nígbà tí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò taara AI ìrànlọ́wọ́, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàn iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ yí ká exact thing wọ́n jẹ́ working lórí.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Kì í ṣe àpótí ìdáhùn mìíràn. Ibi láti kọ́ ni.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Nígbà tí Cancellation àsìkò jẹ́ ju, Tao máa kì í ṣe dá owó padà ìforúkọsílẹ̀ owó even bí ìwọ pinnu láti fagilé tirẹ ìforúkọsílẹ̀. fún bíbéèrè cancellation, ìwọ gbọdọ̀ kan sí Tao ìtọ́jú oníbàárà tàbí adirẹsi email láti support@inspir.app. Nígbà tí ìwọ yan láti fagilé tirẹ ìforúkọsílẹ̀, ìwọ máa rárá longer ní access láti ìforúkọsílẹ̀ àwọn ẹya.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: One aṣiṣe àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ṣe jẹ́ treating gbogbo kaadi kan náà. bí ìwọ mọ̀ kaadi instantly, reviewing ó again tomorrow lè waste àkókò. bí ìwọ fojú kọ kaadi, waiting week lè jẹ́ púpọ̀ long.
